verses.text: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
The same was in the beginning with God.
All things were made by him: and without him was made nothing that was made.
In him was life, and the life was the light of men.

catechismExcerpt: The faith begins by confessing the one God, Maker of heaven and earth, and by receiving the Son as eternally one with the Father.

crossReferences.note: Creation begins with God; John frames Christ within that same beginning.
Creation through the word of the Lord aligns with Johannine theology.
Christ as image of the invisible God and agent of creation.
The Son upholds all things and reveals the Father.
